methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

top.text:
The rotation is shorthanded up top, but the farm is cooking.

Owen Ayers and Josiah Hartshorn are on hot streaks at Double-A Knoxville. Jefferson Rojas has back-to-back 3-hit games. Will Sanders spun five scoreless for Iowa.

The cavalry is

Matthew Boyd starts tonight — first appearance since May 3.

He needed minor knee surgery after a freak injury playing with his kids. Seven weeks later, he's back.

Counsell called it "a big deal." With five starters shelved, he's not wrong

Cubs are 35-34 and 1 game over .500, with the Brewers running away at 41-23.

Division title is out of reach. Wild card is the real race.

This road trip against a 28-41 Giants squad is where the Cubs make their case.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #M

Cubs' starters: 2-12, 7.11 ERA in their last 20 games.

DEAD LAST in baseball.

49 days to the deadline. Hoyer is shopping. Casey Mize and Reid Detmers are among the names. The rotation needs reinforcements — and it needs them fast.

#Cubs

Daniel Palencia — 2.70 ERA, 3 saves, team-best closer — is now on the IL with right elbow inflammation.

Phil Maton inherits the save role. Porter Hodge is already gone for the year.

47 days until the deadline. The bullpen needs help too.

Cubs open a 3-game home series vs the Blue Jays at Wrigley, 1:20 PM CT.

Ben Brown (3-2, 1.74 ERA) takes the ball against Kevin Gausman (4-4, 3.41 ERA).

Two teams within a game of each other — every win matters in this wild card chase.

#C

The Cubs traded Owen Caissie for Cabrera this offseason. Last night he got carted off at Citi Field with a left hamstring strain — headed to the IL.

That's FIVE starters down. Horton, Steele, Taillon, Boyd, and now Cabrera.

#Cubs #MLB #Cu

Cubs 36-34. Brewers 41-25. Cardinals 37-29.

The division is gone — that's math. But 3 games behind St. Louis for a wild card slot? That's a real race.

Two wins in a row. Winnable series tonight and Sunday. This is how you climb.

#Cubs #N

Michael Busch's 3-run shot into McCovey Cove put it on ice. ⚾

Giants are 28-42, running one of baseball's worst rotations. Assad neutralized them — 6 IP, 5 K, 0 homers.

The Cubs needed to beat bad teams. They're doing it.

#Cubs #CubsBase

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

Cubs 9, Mets 6. Swanson had been in the worst slump of his career — he answered with 2 HRs and 4 RBI last night.

PCA added a 3-run shot. Cubs are now 4-0 vs. the Mets in 2026 and counting.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

The Brewers are 41-25. The division is gone.

Cubs sit at 37-35 and locked into the wild card race. Not a concession — a pivot.

Division rivals are crowding the hunt. Every win vs. a basement team matters. Three against Colorado starts tonight.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Assad: 6 IP, 3 H, 5 K. Busch splashed into McCovey Cove — 3-run shot. Cubs 5, Giants 1. 🎯

Assad moves to 4-1, 3rd straight win in 7 starts. Suzuki RBI double, Hoerner sac fly.

Cubs 36-34. The road trip is off to a great start.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Pete Crow-Armstrong hit for the CYCLE. Cubs walk off the Rockies 5-4.

First REVERSE cycle in Cubs franchise history — HR, triple, double, single. The 13th cycle overall.

4-for-4, 2 RBI, 19-game on-base streak. This is what a franchise player looks like.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
